raw_consumer_statement:
I am been dealing with identity theft this year and have freezes on opening new accounts. however, I already had an best buy account and the theft was able to access my account and make purchases. On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX laptops were purchased on my best buy credit card account without my knowledge. 

first purchase on XX/XX/XXXX was {$1800.00} for a XXXX - XXXX XXXX XXXX '' XXXX XXXX XXXX Laptop - XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX - XXXX Memory XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX - XXXX XXXX  - XXXX XXXX second purchase on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX for {$1600.00} for XXXX - XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Laptop - XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX with XXXX Memory XXXX XXXX  - XXXX XXXX then the next day on XX/XX/XXXX the theft went to a different best buy store and returned the XXXX XXXX and purchased an XXXX XXXX and a gift card. then later that day they went to another best buy in XXXX XXXX, TX to return the XXXX XXXX  and purchased another XXXX and a XXXX. 

I did not make any of these transactions and these are fraudulent. I was directed here by Best Buy to make my dispute.
